component.name: GameGobler
component.summary: ROM library manager for microSD cards and Android devices

description.p: GameGobler is a cross-platform tool that makes adding and removing games to microSD cards and Android devices a seamless experience. Browse your ROM library with cover art, discover connected devices, and transfer games with progress tracking.

ul.li: Browse your ROM library organized by system with cover art
Discover connected USB volumes and Android devices automatically
Sync a curated game set to a device
